Equilibrium Style.name: Equilibrium Style
Equilibrium Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting without the confines of armor. You gain the following benefits:

  • While you are wearing light or no armor and not wielding a shield, you can use your action bonus to mark a target within 30 mètres that you can see jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. When you do so, you gain a bonus to AC and Dexterity jet de sauvegardes against effects la cible controls equal to half your Dexterity modificateur (minimum of +1) while marked. You can only have une créature marked in this way at a time.
  • You have avantage on test de Dextérités and Dexterity jet de sauvegardes to avoid being moved.

Snapshot Style.name: Snapshot Style
Snapshot Style.description:
You are skilled at getting up close and personal. You gain the following benefits:

  • You no longer have disavantage on attaque d'arme à distances due to being within 5 mètres of a hostile creature.
  • Your attaque d'arme à distances reduce partial cover by one step (from three-quarters to half or half to one-quarter) against targets within 30 mètres of you. If la cible has one-quarter cover, you ignore it entirely.
  • Your blaster weapon jet de dégâtss against creatures within 30 mètres of you gain a minimum roll threshold, discussed in chapter 7.
  • Grasping a two-handed weapon you are wielding in only one hand with your other hand no longer requires your object interaction.

Onslaught Style.name: Onslaught Style
Onslaught Style.description:
You are skilled at using your momentum to your avantage. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can take the Dash action as a action bonus. If you could already take the Dash action as a action bonus, you can instead take it as a réaction on your turn.
  • When you would make an test de caractéristique to attempt to shove or trip a creature, you can make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps against la cible's AC instead of a contested check. If you are wielding your weapon in two hands, you make this attack roll with avantage.

Brawler Style.name: Brawler Style
Brawler Style.description:
You are skilled at using your weight to your avantage. You gain the following benefits:

  • You are proficient with improvised weapons.
  • Your dégâts die for your unarmed strikes and natural weapons increases by one step (from 1 to [[/r d4]], [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], or [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]]).
  • When you take the Attack action and attempt to grapple, shove, or trip a creature, or make an attack against a creature with an unarmed strike or a weapon wielded in one hand on your turn, you can use your action bonus to make an unarmed strike, grapple, shove, or trip against the same creature.

Throwing Style.name: Throwing Style
Throwing Style.description:
You are skilled with the techniques of throwing weapons. You gain the following benefits:

  • Whenever you make a attaque à distance with a thrown weapon, you can immediately draw another weapon.
  • Whenever you make a attaque à distance with a thrown weapon, you can move up to 5 mètres without provoking attaque d'opportunités.
  • When you miss with a attaque à distance with a thrown weapon, you can use your action bonus to repeat the attack against a creature within 15 mètres and behind your initial target. Any modifications to the original attack roll, such as avantage, disavantage, or without your bonus de maîtrise, also affect this attack roll.

Disruption Style.name: Disruption Style
Disruption Style.description:
Choose one from force- or tech-casting. You are skilled at fighting and interfering with casters of the chosen type. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you force a creature to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration on your turn, and they succeed on the sauvegarde, you can use your action bonus to force them to reroll the sauvegarde. They must use the new roll.
  • Once per round, when a hostile creature attempts to cast a power while within 5 mètres of you, they must first make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde as if to maintain concentration (DD = 10 + the power's niveau). On a failure, the power isn't cast and any points are wasted.

Duelist Style.name: Duelist Style
Duelist Style.description:
You are skilled in the art of fighting with a single weapon. You gain the following benefits:

  • While you are wielding a weapon in one hand with which you are proficient and no other weapons, you can use your action bonus to feint. If you do so, you must make a Dexterity (Escamotage) or Charisma (Deception) check (your choice) contested by la cible's Wisdom (Insight) check. On a success, you have avantage on the first attack roll you make against them before the start of your next turn.
  • While you are wielding a weapon in one hand with which you are proficient and no other weapons, when you miss with a attaque d'arme on your turn, you can use your action bonus to repeat the attack against the same target. Any modifications to the original attack roll, such as avantage, disavantage, or without your bonus de maîtrise, also affect this attack roll.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, drawing or stowing a one-handed weapon no longer requires your object interaction.

Secured Style.name: Secured Style
Secured Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting with weapons in atypical places. You gain the following benefits:

  • At the start of each of your turns while wielding a fixed weapon, vous pouvez choisir to treat the weapon as a light shield jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If you do so, you can't make attacks with the weapon for the duration.
  • You can benefit from fixed weapons while the hand is full.

Explosives Style.name: Explosives Style
Explosives Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting with explosives. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can throw grenades and set mines with your action bonus, instead of your action. If you could already throw grenades and set mines as a action bonus, you can instead do so as a réaction on your turn.
  • When a creature rolls a 1 on the jet de sauvegarde against a grenade, mine, or missile you control, they treat the effect's dégâts as if it had rolled the maximum.

Dual Wield Style.name: Dual Wield Style
Dual Wield Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting with two weapons. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you engage in Two-Weapon Fighting, you can add your modificateur de caractéristique to the jet de dégâts of your Two-Weapon Fighting attack as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.
  • You can draw or stow two weapons when you would normally be able to draw or stow only one.

Split Style.name: Split Style
Split Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting with interlocking weapons. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you engage in Double-Weapon Fighting, you can add your modificateur de caractéristique to the attack roll of your Double-Weapon Fighting attack as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.
  • When you engage in Two-Weapon Fighting, you can add your modificateur de caractéristique to the jet de dégâts of your Two-Weapon Fighting attack as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.

Twin-Blade Style.name: Twin-Blade Style
Twin-Blade Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting with double-bladed weapons. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you engage in Double-Weapon Fighting, you can add your modificateur de caractéristique to the attack roll of your Double-Weapon Fighting attack as long as it doesn't already include that modificateur.
  • Grasping a double weapon you are wielding in only one hand with your other hand no longer requires your object interaction.

Formfighting Style.name: Formfighting Style
Formfighting Style.description:
Prérequis : La capacité de lancer pouvoir de la Forces

Vous maîtrisez les bases des formes connues de combat au sabre laser. Vous bénéficiez des avantages suivants :

  • Vous apprenez trois formes de sabre laser, détaillées plus loin dans ce chapitre.
  • Une fois par chacun de vos tours, vous pouvez dessiner ou ranger une arme légère sans utiliser l'interaction de votre objet.

Mounted Style.name: Mounted Style
Mounted Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting while mounted. You gain the following benefits:

  • Mounting a vehicle or beast only uses 5 mètres of your movement, provided you can reach it.
  • You can force an attack targeted at your mount to target you instead, provided you are a valid target for that attack.

Guerrilla Style.name: Guerrilla Style
Guerrilla Style.description:
You are skilled at maneuvering across the battlefield. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can take the Disengage action as a action bonus. If you could already take the Disengage action as a action bonus, you can instead take it as a réaction on your turn.
  • When you take the Disengage action, you ignore unenhanced difficult terrain, and you have avantage on the first test de caractéristique or jet de sauvegarde to avoid an effect that impairs your vitesse de déplacement or forces you to move before the start of your next turn.

Sentinel Style.name: Sentinel Style
Sentinel Style.description:
You are skilled at techniques that take avantage of every drop in any enemy's guard. You gain the following benefits:

  • Creatures provoke an attaque d'opportunité when they move to within your reach or move 5 mètres or greater while within your reach.
  • Quand vous contactez une créature that is no more than one size larger than you with an attaque d'opportunité, la créature gains 4 slowed niveaus until the end of the current turn.

Blindfighting Style.name: Blindfighting Style
Blindfighting Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting without sight. You gain the following benefits:

  • You gain blindsight out to 10 mètres. If you already have blindsight, it instead increases by 10 mètres.
  • You can use your action bonus to double the range of your blindsight jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

Counterstrike Style.name: Counterstrike Style
Counterstrike Style.description:
You are skilled at returning attacks at those who dare strike you. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you would provoke an attaque d'opportunité on your turn, you can use your action bonus to force la créature to make the attaque d'opportunité, if it can.
  • Creatures who make attaque d'opportunités against you provoke attaque d'opportunités from you.

Defense Style.name: Defense Style
Defense Style.description:
You are skilled at the art of defending yourpersonnelle. You gain the following benefits:

  • While you are wearing medium or heavy armor with which you are proficient, you can use your action bonus to mark a target within 30 mètres that you can see jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. When you do so, dégâts dealt to you by la cible is reduced by an amount equal to half your Strength or Constitution modificateur (your choice, minimum of one) while marked. If this would reduce the dégâts to 0, the dégâts is instead reduced to 1. You can only have une créature marked in this way at a time.
  • You have avantage on test de Forces and Strength jet de sauvegardes to avoid being moved.

Great Weapon Style.name: Grand style d'arme
Great Weapon Style.description:
You are skilled at putting the weight of a weapon to your avantage. You gain the following benefits:

  • While you are wielding a two-handed light- or vibro-weapon with which you are proficient, your weapon jet de dégâtss gain a minimum roll threshold, discussed in chapter 7.
  • Grasping a two-handed weapon you are wielding in only one hand with your other hand no longer requires your object interaction.

Spotting Style.name: Spotting Style
Spotting Style.description:
You are skilled at keeping track of your surroundings. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can take the Search action as a action bonus. If you could already take the Search action as a action bonus, you can instead take it as a réaction on your turn.
  • You have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to determine the nature of illusions. If you would already have avantage, you can instead reroll one of the dice once.

Shield Style.name: Shield Style
Shield Style.description:
You are skilled at using your shield to defend your allies as well as yourpersonnelle. You gain the following benefits:

  • You are no longer restricted to wielding light weapons while wielding a heavy shield.
  • You can use a action bonus to try to shove or trip a creature within 5 mètres of you with your shield.
  • When you use a shield as an improvised weapon, you are considered proficient in it, light shields are considered to have the light and fixed weapon properties, and heavy shields are considered to have the heavy weapon property.

Berserk Style.name: Berserk Style
Berserk Style.description:
You are skilled at returning pain to those who deliver it. You gain the following benefits:

  • Quand vous contactez avec a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Strength, you deal additional dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur if cette créature dealt dégâts to you since the start of your last turn.
  • When you choose to let an attack that would miss you hit you instead, la créature rolls the dégâts as normal instead of choosing the maximum.

Poisoner Style.name: Poisoner Style
Poisoner Style.description:
You are skilled at with the subtlety of poisons. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can apply poisons with your action bonus, instead of your action. If you could already apply poisons as a action bonus, you can instead do so as a réaction on your turn.
  • When a creature rolls a 1 on the jet de sauvegarde against a poison you control, they treat the effect's dégâts as if it had rolled the maximum.

Area Style.name: Area Style
Area Style.description:
You are skilled with weapons that affect an area. You gain the following benefits:

  • When a creature successfully sauvegardes against your projector canister, you can use your action bonus to force them to repeat the sauvegarde.
  • When a creature rolls a 1 on the jet de sauvegarde against a projector canister you control, they treat the effect's dégâts as if it had rolled the maximum.

Sharpshooter Style.name: Sharpshooter Style
Sharpshooter Style.description:
You are skilled with firing at distant targets. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can use your action bonus to mark a target greater than 30 mètres from you that you can see. If you do so, and cette cible moves at least 5 mètres before the start of your next turn, they provoke an attaque d'opportunité from you, and you can make a attaque d'arme à distance with a blaster weapon for that attaque d'opportunité.
  • Your attaque d'arme à distances reduce partial cover by one step (from three-quarters to half or half to one-quarter) against targets greater than 30 mètres from you. If la cible has one-quarter cover, you ignore it entirely.
  • Grasping a two-handed weapon you are wielding in only one hand with your other hand no longer requires your object interaction.

Covert Style.name: Covert Style
Covert Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting from unseen angles. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can take the Hide action as a action bonus. If you could already take the Hide action as a action bonus, you can instead take it as a réaction on your turn.
  • Creatures you've dealt dégâts to since the start of your last turn have disavantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made to find you.

Superiority Style.name: Superiority Style
Superiority Style.description:
You are skilled at utilizing maneuvers to enhance your skills on the battlefield. You gain the following benefits:

  • You learn one maneuver, detailed in Chapter 13. Your maneuver ability is Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution for physical maneuvers (your choice), Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma for mental maneuvers (your choice), and an ability de votre choix for general maneuvers.
  • You gain one dé de supériorité, which is a [[/r d4]]. This die changes as you gain niveaus: to [[/r d6]] at niveau 5, to [[/r d8]] at niveau 9, to [[/r d10]] at niveau 13, and to [[/r d12]] at niveau 17. A dé de supériorité is expended quand vous utilisez it. Vous regagnez tous of your expended dés de supériorité when you finish a short or repos long.

Gunning Style.name: Gunning Style
Gunning Style.description:
You are skilled at using blasters in unique ways. You gain the following benefits:

  • When a creature rolls a 1 on the jet de sauvegarde against your burst or rapid property, they treat the effect's dégâts as if it had rolled the maximum.
  • When you use the burst property of a weapon, you can instead spray a line 20 mètres long and 5 mètres wide within range with shots.
  • When you use the rapid property of a weapon, when you roll the weapon's dégâts dice twice, you can double one set of the weapon's dégâts dice and forgo the other instead of adding them together.

Formation Style.name: Formation Style
Formation Style.description:
You are skilled at fighting with a partner. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can take the Guard action as a action bonus. If you could already take the Guard action as a action bonus, you can instead take it as a réaction on your turn.
  • When you move on your turn, you can use a action bonus to allow a willing ally within 5 mètres of you to move with you (no action required by the ally). The ally must end this movement within 5 mètres of you, and this movement can't exceed the ally's speed.
  • When you choose to let an attack that would hit a guarded ally hit you instead, la créature rolls the dégâts as normal instead of choosing the maximum.

Versatile Style.name: Versatile Style
Versatile Style.description:
You are skilled at using weapons in different ways. You gain the following benefits:

  • When you miss with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps on your turn while wielding a versatile weapon with which you are proficient in two hands, you can use your action bonus to repeat the attack roll against the same target using one hand. Any modifications to the original attack roll, such as avantage, disavantage, or without your bonus de maîtrise, also affect this attack roll.
  • When you miss with a attaque d'arme au corps à corps on your turn while wielding a versatile weapon with which you are proficient in one hand, you can use your action bonus to attempt to shove or trip cette créature. Any modifications to the original attack roll, such as avantage, disavantage, or without your bonus de maîtrise, also affect this test de caractéristique.
  • Grasping a versatile weapon you are wielding in only one hand with your other hand no longer requires your object interaction.

Assisting Style.name: Assisting Style
Assisting Style.description:
You are skilled at enabling your allies. You gain the following benefits:

  • You can take the Help action as a action bonus. If you could already take the Help action as a action bonus, you can instead take it as a réaction on your turn.
  • Creatures benefiting from your Help action can't have disavantage on the affected test de caractéristique or attack roll.
